subject: Health and Physical Education
note: Achievement objectives from the New Zealand Curriculum. Four strands: Personal Health and Physical Development (PHPD); Movement Concepts and Motor Skills (MCMS); Relationships with Other People (ROP); Healthy Communities and Environments (HCE).

objectives.subject: Health and PE
objectives.text: Identify and describe their own feelings and explore and share ideas about wellbeing

objectives.subject: Health and PE
objectives.text: Develop fundamental movement skills and apply these in simple movement situations

objectives.subject: Health and PE
objectives.text: Describe their feelings and responses to a range of situations; explain ways of keeping themselves safe and healthy

objectives.subject: Health and PE
objectives.text: Identify and demonstrate ways of maintaining and enhancing relationships between individuals and within groups

objectives.subject: Health and PE
objectives.text: Identify personal, social, and environmental factors that affect personal and group wellbeing; describe strategies for promoting and maintaining wellbeing

objectives.subject: Health and PE
objectives.text: Analyse personal, social, and environmental factors that influence health-related behaviours and describe strategies for promoting wellbeing during adolescence

objectives.subject: Health and PE
objectives.text: Demonstrate an understanding of how to develop and manage respectful relationships; identify and apply strategies to manage conflict and maintain personal safety

objectives.subject: Health and PE
objectives.text: Critically analyse factors that influence health and wellbeing and evaluate strategies for health promotion, including cultural and social perspectives
